news.headline: Annual report for 2024 year-end and meeting notice disclosed.

news.summary: Dallas-based Twin Hospitality Group Inc., which oversees popular restaurant brands Twin Peaks and Smokey Bones, will be conducting a conference call to discuss its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. Scheduled for May 8, 2025, at 6:00 PM Eastern Time, the call will be preceded by the release of a press statement detailing the company's Q1 2025 financial results. Twin Hospitality operates under the NASDAQ symbol TWNP.
news.headline: Twin Hospitality Group Inc. to announce first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025 in a conference call at 6:00 PM ET.

news.summary: Brighton Marine in Brighton, Massachusetts has declared plans to invest $10 million over the next five years to enhance housing and programming services aimed at preventing and ending Veteran homelessness. The non-profit operates the US Family Health Plan of Southern New England, a Tricare Prime health plan, covering Massachusetts, Rhode Island, New Hampshire, and Connecticut. CEO Rosye B. Cloud announced the expansion at an event recognizing longstanding efforts.
news.headline: Brighton Marine invests $10 million to prevent and end veteran homelessness in Massachusetts, Rhode Island, New Hampshire, and Connecticut. CEO announced the initiative.

news.summary: Traditional methods of assessing the effects of tariffs and uncertainty have been sluggish in recognizing their significance, prompting economists to analyze corporate earnings calls and private-sector data for insight.
news.headline: Economists search for signs of recession due to slow impact of tariffs. Turning to earnings calls for data.

news.summary: In Washington, health care and patient advocacy experts recently discussed the fast progress of medical innovation at the National Health Council (NHC) Science of Patient Engagement Symposium. They highlighted the impact of technology on patient diagnosis, treatment, and quality of life. The conference, Elevating Innovation: Medicine, MedTech, and AI, took place on May 7-8 at the National Press Club and gathered over 150 policymakers, researchers, patients, and advocates.
news.headline: Health care experts showcase innovation in medicine, MedTech, AI at NHC Symposium in Washington, highlighting technology's impact on patient care. Over 150 attended.

news.summary: In Ripon, Wisconsin on May 7, 2025, Alliance Laundry Systems, a top provider of commercial laundry equipment, has taken action to address a problem with its Series 6 tumble dryers. The company has allocated extensive resources to resolve this issue. Their service and support team is actively working on this matter to ensure the safety and functionality of the products.
news.headline: Alliance Laundry Systems to fix issue with Series 6 tumble dryers, deploying significant resources.

news.summary: Celebrating ambitious entrepreneurs who are influencing the future, the Entrepreneur Of The Year awards revealed its finalists for the esteemed Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Heartland Award. Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) made the announcement in EAGAN, Minn., on May 7, 2025. This year marks the 40th anniversary of the award, recognizing outstanding entrepreneurs making a significant impact on the business world. The number of finalists and the details of their entrepreneurial ventures were not disclosed in the news.
news.headline: EY US names Shashi Yadiki of Smart Data Solutions a finalist for Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 Heartland Award. Celebrates innovative entrepreneurs shaping the future.

news.summary: On May 21, the host city and competition dates for the upcoming event will be unveiled in a live broadcast. This announcement will also encompass a detailed scientific and medical update and the introduction of new athletes. The broadcast will originate from New York, the birthplace of the first games. Stay tuned for the latest information on this highly anticipated event taking place in 18 days.
news.headline: Enhanced Games to announce host city and competition dates live on May 21 from New York.

news.summary: A newly launched GED Marketplace program aims to assist individuals in boosting their confidence, maintaining focus, and successfully passing the GED test. This initiative is particularly significant for adults aiming to improve job prospects, access higher education, or achieve personal objectives. The program was introduced in New York on May 7, 2025, and offers support to individuals navigating the challenges of preparing for the GED test. The initiative aims to provide essential resources and guidance to learners, helping them stay on track and successfully complete the test. The program seeks to make a positive impact on individuals pursuing educational and career advancement opportunities.
news.headline: Brainfuse partners with GED Testing Service to provide live tutoring to students, helping them gain confidence and pass the test.

news.summary: Dublin, Ohio, May 7, 2025 - Meeder Investment Management has announced the passing of its founder, Robert "Bob" Meeder Sr., who peacefully died in his sleep on April 24, 2025. The company mourns this loss while honoring his remarkable life's accomplishments.
news.headline: Bob Meeder Sr., founder of Meeder Investment Management, passed away on April 24, 2025, leaving a legacy of impact.
Company X has purchased 50,000 of its own shares at $10 each, totaling $500,000, for future use.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, Joe Hand Promotions (JHP) has joined forces with Most Valuable Promotions (MVP), a pioneering boxing promotion co-founded by Jake Paul and Nakisa Bidarian. This collaboration will bring two highly anticipated boxing events to bars, restaurants, casinos, and commercial venues throughout North America. The partnership follows the success of the Jake Paul vs. Mike Tyson event and aims to cater to a wide audience. Joe Hand Promotions is known for distributing live sports content, while MVP is making waves in the boxing world. Together, they plan to deliver top-notch entertainment to a large number of establishments.
news.headline: Joe Hand Promotions and Most Valuable Promotions team up to bring summer boxing events to commercial venues across North America.

news.summary: A recent report on U.S. Grocery Shopper Trends for 2025 by FMI provides valuable insights into consumer behavior in the food industry. The report focuses on shoppers' food budgets, shopping decisions, and trends in grocery shopping. With a comprehensive analysis of consumer preferences, the report sheds light on key aspects shaping the future of grocery shopping. This data is crucial for businesses looking to understand and cater to the evolving needs of shoppers in the market.
news.headline: FMI's report on 2025 US Grocery Shopper Trends reveals insights on consumer behaviors & budgets. via @BusinessWire

news.summary: The news article highlights four major issues the market is facing today: Indian missiles hitting Pakistan, formal talks between the U.S. and China beginning soon, the Fed announcing its rate decision, and China's steps to replace the dollar with the yuan. The chart of gold ETF SPDR Gold Trust (GLD) is being used as an early indicator for investors. Despite tensions between India and Pakistan, gold prices are not surging, indicating a belief that the situation will deescalate. Similarly, despite positive headlines about U.S.-China trade talks, gold prices are not collapsing, suggesting low expectations for significant outcomes. This analysis showcases the importance of understanding investor positioning for gaining a competitive edge in the market. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Indian missiles hit Pakistan following a terrorist attack. U.S.-China talks start soon. Fed rate decision today. China plans to replace dollar with yuan. Gold remains stable, indicating de-escalation of tensions. Trade talks unlikely to produce significant impact. Fed chair Powell to hold press conference.

news.summary: Schneider Electric Canada, based in Mississauga, Ontario, has recently been acknowledged as one of Canada’s Greenest Employers for 2025 by Mediacorp Canada Inc. This recognition is part of the Canada’s Top 100 Employers project, which celebrates companies at the forefront of promoting environmental sustainability within the country. Schneider Electric's commitment to advancing climate action and driving clean energy innovation has been instrumental in receiving this prestigious honor. This recognition showcases Schneider Electric's dedication to fostering a workplace focused on sustainability.
news.headline: Schneider Electric Canada named one of Canada’s Greenest Employers for 2025, honored by Mediacorp Canada Inc. for environmental sustainability efforts.

news.summary: FlightSafety International (FSI), a renowned aviation training provider, has revealed plans to enlarge its facilities at Farnborough Airport, a prominent hub for British aviation and Europe's top airport for premium air travel connections. This initiative underscores FSI's dedication to improving aviation safety and training standards in Europe. The forthcoming FSI center is set to launch in the second quarter of 2027. Lease agreements have been confirmed, and all necessary planning permissions are in place, signalling a significant step forward for FSI's presence in the region.
news.headline: FlightSafety International is expanding at Farnborough Airport in Europe, with a new center opening in 2027.

news.summary: In Seattle, CueZen, a health-focused AI personalization engine, has secured $5 million in funding. The investment, led by Point72 Ventures and joined by Pack VC, Fortson VC, and Nextinfinity, aims to boost customer acquisition and enhance CueZen's platform features for health enterprises looking to tailor their digital services. The health sector struggles with engaging users due to scattered app data, a problem CueZen seeks to address through its innovative solutions.
news.headline: CueZen, an AI-based health personalization engine, secures $5m funding from Point72 Ventures, Pack VC, Fortson VC, and Nextinfinity to enhance platform capabilities and customer acquisition.
FORVIA announces Combined General Meeting on 28 May 2025. Preparatory documents available. Mark your calendar!
Valneva discloses shares & voting rights on 30/04/2025.

news.summary: A resident of Huntington, West Virginia, Joseph Thomas Holley has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a 2025 Life Achiever for his noteworthy contributions to the Industrial Piping Supply Industry. With a prominent presence in the sector, Mr. Holley is celebrated for his significant impact and achievements.
news.headline: Joseph Thomas Holley recognized as 2025 Life Achiever for his contributions in the Industrial Piping Supply Industry by The Inner Circle.

news.summary: Demonstrating its commitment to advancing automotive display standards, the Video Electronics Standards Association (VESA®) will unveil cutting-edge software model and FPGA validation platforms at SID Display Week in BEAVERTON, Ore on May 7, 2025. These platforms are tailored to expedite the integration of the new standard in automotive displays. The new technology is poised to revolutionize the industry with enhanced efficiency and performance. Attendees can witness the groundbreaking innovation firsthand at the event.
news.headline: VESA unveils Compliance Test Specification Model for DisplayPort Automotive Extensions Standard to be showcased at SID Display Week.

news.summary: In San Francisco on May 7, 2025, a notable smart building platform, R-Zero, is assisting commercial real estate innovators in addressing prevalent issues such as escalating operating expenses, changing occupancy trends, and increasing tenant demands. The comprehensive solution offered by R-Zero integrates various components to effectively combat these challenges, thereby offering significant benefits to the industry.
news.headline: R-Zero helps real estate address rising costs, occupancy changes, and tenant demands with a smart building platform.

news.summary: A renowned footwear company has recently announced its sponsorship of San Francisco's famous Bay to Breakers race, scheduled for Sunday, May 18. This exciting partnership aims to bring fresh energy to the iconic event. The race, known as Bay to Breakers Powered by Windsurf, will now have the support of the footwear leader, marking a significant collaboration for the historical race. The sponsorship signals a promising new chapter for Bay to Breakers, with participants and spectators eagerly anticipating the enhanced experience brought by this new partnership.
news.headline: Skechers partners with Bay to Breakers Powered by Windsurf 2025 in SF, adding new sponsor for iconic footrace.

news.summary: Sponsored by NIKE and PVH Corp, Harlem's Fashion Row (HFR) held its 7th Annual Designer Retreat in New York City from May 6 to 8, 2025. The event aimed to uplift and amplify underrepresented designers. This initiative aligns with HFR's ongoing mission, showcasing its commitment to supporting diversity and creativity in the fashion industry.
news.headline: Harlem's Fashion Row hosts 7th Annual Designer Retreat in NYC on May 6-8, 2025, sponsored by NIKE and PVH Corp.

news.summary: Greenhouse, a prominent hiring platform, introduced a range of new products at the UNLEASH Conference in Las Vegas on May 7, 2025. These products incorporate advanced AI features aimed at streamlining the hiring process for companies. The AI tools embedded in these products allow companies to save valuable time by handling mundane tasks efficiently, thereby enabling them to concentrate more on core aspects of hiring. This development signifies a significant step forward in leveraging technology for enhancing hiring practices.
news.headline: Greenhouse introduces AI-driven products at UNLEASH to simplify hiring; reduces time on tasks. LAS VEGAS, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, RYNO Strategic Solutions, a prominent digital marketing agency focused on home services, revealed the promotion of Co-Founder Anna Yano to President. Yano will now be responsible for leading the organization.
news.headline: RYNO Strategic Solutions appoints Co-Founder Anna Yano as President of the organization in Phoenix, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) revealed that President and Chief Operating Officer John Nallen is set to take part in MoffettNathanson's Media, Internet & Communications Conference 2025. The event is scheduled for May 14 at around 2:20pm.
news.headline: Fox Corporation's COO John Nallen will join MoffettNathanson's conference on May 14 at 2:20pm - part of Fox's media strategy. 230 characters.

news.summary: In a significant development on May 7, 2025, Papé Kenworth unveiled a cutting-edge full-service dealership in Federal Way, WA. This marks a noteworthy expansion of their dedication to providing top-notch customer service and equipment assistance across the Pacific Northwest region. The new dealership stands as a testament to their commitment to excellence and innovation in the industry, underscoring their mission to cater to the growing customer base in the area. This move solidifies Papé Kenworth's commitment to enhancing accessibility and support for their clientele, showcasing their dedication to world-class service delivery.
news.headline: Papé Kenworth opens new facility in Federal Way, WA, enhancing customer service in Pacific NW.

news.summary: Hyderabad, India will host the second annual event highlighting developer innovation and cloud native leadership on May 7, 2025. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), dedicated to fostering ecosystems for cloud-native software, revealed the keynote speakers for the event. This initiative aims to showcase cutting-edge trends and insights in the tech industry.
news.headline: CNCF revealed speakers and sessions for KubeCon + CloudNativeCon India 2025 event in Hyderabad, featuring developer innovation and cloud native leadership.

news.summary: Seattle's Anvil Secure, an information security consultancy, made public today the recruitment of John "JC" Collins as their Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Collins, an industry veteran, will bring his expertise to the Seattle-based firm, which caters to a worldwide clientele. This move is seen as a strategic measure to address the increasing demand for their services.
news.headline: Anvil Secure names John Collins as Chief Revenue Officer to adapt to evolving info security market.

news.summary: In Princeton, New Jersey on May 7, 2025, the Center for Supportive Schools (CSS), a nonprofit in the education sector, announced the introduction of Peer Group Connection-Elementary School (PGC-ES), a fresh cross-age peer leadership initiative. This program is designed to enhance peer support and leadership skills among elementary school students.
news.headline: Center for Supportive Schools introduces Peer Group Connection-Elementary School program, expanding peer leadership offerings.

news.summary: SimpleClosure, a startup based in Santa Monica, California, revealed on May 7, 2025, that it has secured new funding to support its growth and expansion efforts amidst a changing economic environment. The company, known for facilitating closures of startups in a simple and reliable manner, successfully raised a significant amount of capital. This will enable SimpleClosure to meet the rising demand for its services and enhance its product offerings.
news.headline: SimpleClosure raises $15M in Series A to fuel growth and product expansion amid increasing demand in startups.

news.summary: BMI Imaging Systems, Inc. based in SUNNYVALE, Calif., as of May 7, 2025, is dedicated to providing cutting-edge record management solutions for California Community College Registrars and Admissions Officers. The company specializes in digital scanning and secure hosting services, ensuring the safety and accessibility of important records. By offering innovative solutions, BMI Imaging Systems supports these educational institutions in efficiently managing their records.
news.headline: BMI Imaging Systems presents digital solutions for California Community Colleges at 2025 CACCRAO Conference. Sunnyvale, Calif. May 7, 2025. Leader in scanning and hosting services. #innovation

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, FAT Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: FAT) disclosed it will conduct a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes on May 8, 2025, at 5:30 PM ET. The company, recognized for brands like Round Table Pizza, Fatburger, Johnny Rockets, Twin Peaks, and Fazoli’s among others, will release a press statement detailing the financial results before the call.
news.headline: FAT Brands to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. Company owns 16 restaurant concepts.

news.summary: A prominent Texas jewelry designer, Dian Malouf, is gaining recognition across the country for her stunning pieces that are all proudly crafted in the United States. Based in Dallas, her unique designs have captivated women everywhere. Utilizing a meticulous process, each piece starts with a hand-carved wax model, skillfully crafted by her team of expert wax carvers. Malouf's commitment to American-made jewelry has resonated with customers, contributing to her increasing popularity. The reach of her designs extends beyond Texas, with fans from coast to coast appreciating her bold and exceptional creations.
news.headline: Texan jewelry designer Dian Malouf creates unique, USA-made pieces celebrated nationwide for her bold designs.

news.summary: A prominent cloud-based business telephony company, 800.com, revealed the introduction of its latest call tracking platform in New York today. This innovative platform aims to equip businesses and agencies with valuable marketing insights at a significantly reduced cost compared to conventional providers, up to a remarkable 50% lower. The technology, created based on user feedback and a focus on product excellence, allows companies to enhance campaign effectiveness, reduce marketing expenses, and increase measurable revenue.
news.headline: 800.com releases call tracking platform, 50% cheaper than competitors, helps optimize campaigns & cut marketing waste.

news.summary: James Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Perpetua to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained $50,000 worth of Perpetua shares within the period from April 17, 2024, to February 13, 2025, and wish to discuss your options, Wilson is available for consultation.
news.headline: Investors alerted by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to contact for losses in Perpetua Resources Corp purchased/acquired $50,000 between April 17, 2024, and Feb 13, 2025.
Sodexo Stop Hunger Foundation gives $5,000 grant to 5 students and employees to fight food insecurity in communities.

news.summary: Celanese Corporation (NYSE: CE) exceeded expectations in its first quarter earnings report released after the market close on Monday. Earnings stood at 57 cents per share, surpassing the predicted 38 cents per share. The company's quarterly sales totaled $2.39 billion, outperforming the estimated $2.25 billion. President and CEO Scott Richardson noted that the company's first-quarter results demonstrated a continuation of the previous quarter's trends in end markets and demand. Despite ongoing discussions around tariffs, Celanese experienced no significant disruptions. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Celanese (CE) exceeds Q1 earnings and sales estimates, with 57 cents per share and $2.39 billion, boosting analyst forecasts.

news.summary: Bitcoin investors are capitalizing on the current high prices, cashing out profits averaging $1 billion per day. This surge in profit-taking has raised concerns about a potential market slowdown or reversal. Despite increased institutional participation, market analysts warn of a possible "local top or sharp correction" if profit-taking levels persist. The current 7-day moving average realized profit across all investors is around $1 billion per day. The market is compared to late 2024, with Bitcoin reaching close to $98,000 and facing heightened profit-taking, reminiscent of late-stage bull market behavior. Despite the growth in institutional participation, investor psychology remains unchanged, signaling potential market risks. This article does not offer investment advice and highlights the importance of conducting personal research before making any investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin's $1B daily profits signal 'late-stage bull market' as investors cash out at record levels, raising concerns of a possible market slowdown. Institutional participation hasn't shifted mindset, warns CryptoQuant. High profit-taking risks BTC 'local top or sharp correction.'

news.summary: The Governor of Colorado, Jared Polis, is being called upon by Teamsters to sign HB 25-1122 after it was approved by the Colorado State Senate. This legislation mandates the need for a qualified individual to be present in all autonomous vehicles. This move could position Governor Polis as a leader in autonomous vehicle policy nationwide.
news.headline: Teamsters urge Gov. Polis to sign HB 25-1122 in Colorado for autonomous vehicle policy; passed by State Senate.

news.summary: In Purchase, New York, on May 7, 2025, Alpine Saxon Woods, a prominent asset management company, revealed the selection of Patrick Coyne as the new Head of Sales. Coyne brings extensive experience in sales and client management in the financial sector, positioning him well for his new role.
news.headline: Alpine Saxon Woods appoints Patrick Coyne as new Head of Sales to enhance client relations and boost growth.

news.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson is urging investors who experienced losses in Ibotta to reach out to him personally to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or acquired Ibotta stocks via the registration statement and suffered financial losses, it is advised to contact directly to discuss available options.
news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Ibotta. Ibotta investors who suffered losses encouraged to contact James Wilson.

news.summary: New lightweight innovations have been introduced to overcome obstacles in processes, boost productivity, and add value. Recently unveiled in Orlando, Florida on May 7, 2025 at SAS INNOVATE, SAS, a prominent data and AI organization, has launched a range of new solutions as part of their $1 billion investment in industry solutions.
news.headline: SAS introduces new AI models to tackle business challenges, part of $1 billion investment in industry solutions.

news.summary: Verimatrix, a global leader in people-centered security technologies listed on Euronext Paris under VMX, was recently recognized by QKS Group as a technology leader for 2025 in the In-App Protection category. The analyst at QKS Group, Ayush Patidar, specifically highlighted Verimatrix XTD (Extended Threat Defense) for its comprehensive approach to application security, incorporating zero-code protection and AI technology. This recognition solidifies Verimatrix's position in the industry as a top contender in ensuring secure digital experiences.
news.headline: Verimatrix named technology leader in In-App Protection by QKS Group in 2025. Expert notes Verimatrix XTD offers strong application security.
